announcements.headline: RC Drilling Completed at Blair North and Viking
summary: TalonX has completed RC drilling programs at both Blair North and Viking projects, marking a key exploration milestone that could de-risk the asset base and provide near-term catalysts upon assay results.

Completion of drilling at two separate targets simultaneously signals an accelerated exploration strategy, suggesting management confidence in prospectivity and adequate funding to pursue multiple fronts — investors should monitor cash burn relative to remaining treasury.

Assay results from the completed RC program represent the next critical catalyst; positive intercepts at either Blair North or Viking could materially re-rate the stock, while the market will be watching for grade, width, and continuity data in coming weeks.

announcements.headline: Earnings Guidance - FY2026 Full year
summary: EVZ Limited has issued FY2026 full-year earnings guidance, signaling management confidence in forward visibility and willingness to set market expectations for the coming fiscal year.

The provision of earnings guidance is a positive signal for institutional investors, as it suggests sufficient revenue pipeline certainty and operational stability to commit to quantitative forecasts — a key differentiator for micro/small-cap ASX names.

Investors should closely monitor the specific guidance range metrics (revenue, EBITDA, margins) against consensus estimates to assess whether this represents an upgrade, downgrade, or initiation of formal guidance, which will drive near-term re-rating potential.

announcements.headline: Consent Granted for Bendigo Gold Project Land Purchase
summary: Santana Minerals has received consent from the Overseas Investment Office (OIO) to acquire land critical to the Bendigo Gold Project in New Zealand, removing a key regulatory hurdle for project advancement.

Land acquisition consent de-risks the permitting pathway and strengthens Santana's control over the project footprint, which is essential for progressing toward a mining permit and eventual development of the high-grade Bendigo-Ophir gold deposit.

With OIO consent secured, the market should expect accelerated progress on resource definition, feasibility studies, and environmental consenting — catalysts that could materially re-rate the stock as the project moves closer to development-stage valuation.
